stations.name: Radio San Marino
stations.description: San Marino FM service listed by the official San Marino RTV radio page for San Marino Città. Licensee: San Marino RTV. Frequency: 102.7 MHz. Address: Viale J.F.Kennedy, 13 - 47890, San Marino Città, Repubblica di San Marino. Contact: radio@sanmarinortv.sm.
stations.source: San Marino RTV official radio page
